creator: jrista@hotmail.com
text:
The KDE KDM Display Manager has a login problem. After boot, login under any name. After running KDM, only the user who originally logged in from the command prompt can log in with the display manager. i.e. If I log in as root only root can log in with KDM. If I log in as jrista only jrista can log in with KDM. If I set kdm to run from a /usr/X11R6/etc/rc.d/ script (i.e. kdm.sh*) only root can log in with KDM.

How-To-Repeat: Boot to command prompt. Log in under any name. Type kdm at the prompt. Try to log in under a diffrent name as the one originally logged in as.
